title: Doc (disambiguation)
content:
'''Doc''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*Slang for "'''[[doctor]]'''"
*'''[[Doc]]''', a [[junk droid]]
*'''[[Doc (clone trooper)|Doc]]''', a [[clone trooper]]
*'''[[Doc (Tualon Yaluna)|Doc]]''', a [[Clone trooper]] in [[Tualon Yaluna's company]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
* Slang for "'''[[Doctor/Legends|doctor]]'''"

===Droids===
*'''[[A-OIC]]''', a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] built by [[Massad Thrumble]] nicknamed "'''Doc'''"
*'''[[MD-0C6]]''', a medical [[Droid/Legends|droid]] in [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]] nicknamed "'''Doc'''"

===Individuals===
*'''[[Cesi Eirriss]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] nicknamed "'''Doc'''"
*'''[[Archiban Frodrick Kimble]]''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Medic/Legends|medic]] nicknamed "'''Doc'''"
*'''[[Klaus Vandangante/Legends|Klaus Vandangante]]''', an [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw tech]] who used the alias "'''Doc'''"

==Non-canon==
*"'''[[Doc (Jedi Chef)|Doc]]'''", an announcer for [[Corpo (Hutt)|Corpo]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]

{{Disambig}}

|ja=ドク
}}
